unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
There is a note: "I am on a business trip right now, if it's urgent, please call my secretary."
first_dialog: *He is on his phone, presumably calling someone about work*. Yes, yes, also tell Mr. Suit that we need to move the assets out of Siliconia and we are beginning investments into Aldorian fungal farms.

Hang on, sorry, some kid is bothering me right now and I need to handle it - 
Okay kid, what do you want? Make it quick, I need to get back to my call soon - millions of dollars are on the line.
player_dialog: Does your lawn need to be mowed?
first_job_offer: Oh, of course. I'm a busy man and I just got back from my business trip so my yard could use a trim. Now if you excuse me, I have to handle the purchase of some cherry tomato futures.
